series_metadata.series_description: Records include geologic exploration reports and supporting documents associated with a Final Permit to Install, to include boring logs, laboratory tests and any attached exhibits characterizing subsurface conditions at a site.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep at least until the related facility is closed or the records are no longer of value to the Division as a technical reference for determining suitability of the site to comply with future Permit to Install requirements. Review annually ; Electronic: Keep at least until the related facility is closed or the records are no longer of value to the Division as a technical reference for determining suitability of the site to comply with future Permit to Install requirements. Review annually, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
